Brilliance
Chat Pulse Studio Bloom Identity Automations Library Settings
Brilliance · by RoweOS v33.0
Sidebar · v33.0 rebrand preview

Sidebar & chrome rebrand

Same structure, every visible string updated. The footer reads "Brilliance · by RoweOS" with a Brilli status dot. Hover the sidebar to expand.

Before (v32.x)

Footer reads

Brand textRoweOS
StatusOnline indicator
Versionv32.1
MarkRoweOS gold B
After (v33.0)

Footer reads

Brand textBrilliance · by RoweOS
StatusBrilli pulse dot
Versionv33.0
MarkBrilliance B (same icon)

What changed

Sidebar header logo + nameBrilliance
Sidebar footer creditby RoweOS
Status dot becomes BrilliPulses on automation completion
Sidebar item labelsUnchanged (Chat, Pulse, Studio, etc.)
Per-brand accent colorUnchanged (--brand-accent)
Mode pickers (BrandAI / LifeAI)Unchanged

Why this works

The mark stays familiar (existing app icon), reducing recognition disruption. The brand name updates without rearranging muscle memory. The Brilli status dot is the only new affordance, and it earns its place by signaling presence (pulses softly when an automation completes silently).
